Issues: Source Origin (Synthetic Model): While the image quality is excellent, if this image was generated using AI tools, the seller must be aware of the legal landscape regarding the use of generated likenesses. To avoid future IP risk, the seller should document the origin of the model's appearance to prove it is a purely derivative work, not a mimicry of a living person.

Trademark/Brand Risk: If the jewelry or the specific setting is intended to represent a brand, explicit licensing or confirmation of originality is required to avoid claims of deceptive advertising or infringement.
